description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble Curious George, a well-known cartoon monkey character. The toy features a light beige face, ears, hands, and feet, with the rest of the body in a darker brown fabric. It wears a bright red T-shirt with the words 'Curious George' printed in yellow on the front. The face is simple and friendly, with round black eyes and a small stitched mouth, giving it a cheerful and approachable appearance. The limbs are soft and slightly floppy, typical of stuffed toys, and the overall construction appears cuddly and child-friendly. The toy is proportioned with a large head and short limbs, enhancing its cute and playful look.
description: A plush Curious George stuffed toy with a red 'Curious George' T-shirt, beige face and limbs, and a friendly, simple expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toy's face, red T-shirt with yellow 'Curious George' text, and both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, ear, and the side of the red T-shirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and the plain red T-shirt without any text.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the side of the red T-shirt.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and neutral, with round black eyes and a small, subtle stitched smile. The absence of eyebrows or exaggerated features gives it a gentle and friendly look.
attribute_clothing_or_accessories: red T-shirt with yellow 'Curious George' text
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly forward and legs apart, the head facing straight ahead.
